features: Moisturising Hand Wash – Gently cleanses while nourishing and hydrating hands, leaving them soft and refreshed.
Delicious Raspberry Ripple Scent – Enjoy a sweet and fruity fragrance inspired by classic fairground treats.
Protect & Care Formula – Helps to eliminate germs and bacteria while being gentle on the skin.
Vegan & Cruelty-Free – Leaping Bunny approved, 100% vegan, and not tested on animals.
Fun & Whimsical Packaging – A playful fairground-themed design makes this hand wash great for families and kids.
description: Product Description Experience the sweet nostalgia of the fairground with Astonish Fun of the Fair Protect & Care Moisturising Hand Wash in Raspberry Ripple scent. This gentle yet effective formula cleanses while nourishing and hydrating your hands, leaving them soft and refreshed. Infused with a deliciously sweet fragrance, it transforms handwashing into a delightful experience. The 600ml pump bottle provides long-lasting use, perfect for the whole family. Plus, it's vegan, cruelty-free, and Leaping Bunny certified, ensuring a kind and ethical choice for your skin and the planet. Ingredients Aqua, Sodium Laureth Sulfate, Sodium Chloride, Cocamide DEA, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Sodium Benzoate, Parfum, Glycerin, Citric Acid, Lactic Acid, Tetrasodium Glutamate Diacetate, Linalool, CI 45100, CI 17200 Manufacturer Contact Information Manufactured by: The London Oil Refining Co. Ltd., BD3 7AF, Bradford, UK. Advena Ltd, Tower Business Centre, 2nd Flr., Tower Street, Swatar, BKR 4013, Malta. See more
